hyperedges.label: AI Coding IDE Competition in 2026
hyperedges.source_file: 20260416-Geminiデスクトップアプリ-Canvas進化-Cursor-Windsurf2-AI整体師.html
hyperedges.description: Multiple AI-powered coding IDEs (Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code) are competing in the programming editor market in 2026, with Cursor 3 adding agent visualization and Windsurf 2.0 being released.

hyperedges.label: Video Generation AI Landscape 2026
hyperedges.source_file: 20260405-AIトレンド-動画生成AI-PixVerse-Wan-Seedance-Veo-ClaudeCode新機能-AI大学.html
hyperedges.description: Video generation AI models from ByteDance (Seedance 2.0), Google (Veo 3.1 Lite), OpenAI (Sora), PixVerse (V6 with PixR1 world model), and Wan (2.7) are competing in the video generation space.

hyperedges.label: OpenClaw Security Vulnerabilities and Ecosystem
hyperedges.source_file: 20260202-OpenClaw900台丸裸-セキュリティ崩壊-エージェント経済-さとる.html
hyperedges.description: OpenClaw and related tools (Clawdbot, AutoClaw) face serious security vulnerabilities including prompt injection and exposed instances on Shodan, while competitors like Letta AI position themselves as more secure alternatives.
